review_title: An excellent content management system for those looking to write content related to specific Niche
description: CrawlQ is an AI-powered content creation platform that enables your brand to craft the appropriate content for your customers. It lets professionals quickly generate highly personalized insights, stories, questions, and answers based on their customer persona research. It also helps you engage your audience by using your brand's voice in the right content and in the right context. It again provides you with actionable insights to help generate learnings that you can use in your marketing strategy.
author: Jean Bertin C.
pros: I was a bit skeptical when I heard about this tool, but the weekend went by really quickly and it turns out to be a huge help. I can't wait to see how it'll turn out in the end! I first Struggled with the it and did not found any use of because of the number of field to be filled in order to get outcome. But soon , I went through only 15% of the input myself when CrawlQ suggested AI input, but after I printed my script, I was really impressed with what it came up with. There are all sorts of helpful templates available that can be extremely valuable for making copies. I enjoy using this AI copywriter because it really caters to my lack of skills in the copywriting arena. I know my niche and what I want to cover, but just don't have the writing skills. Compared to other AI programs, this one is a bit different, which can make comparisons tricky. Besides that, you still need to put all of these benefits into a cohesive story. My other AI writers don't do that. With this tool I can produce my own content, and it multiplies the effectiveness of AI input. The text is also formatted as sales copy, so it's accurate.
cons: If you are planning to use this tool, you must learn at least that this is for mature people only. This SaaS teaches you the fundamentals of what to plan for - before you launch a product, develop content or even start a blog. So the downside will be that there is a learning Curve and some work to be done on your part. This came to me as a shock and as a deal breaker until I forced myself to learn and complete my first project. It is until then that I discovered the real power of CrawlQ.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A strategic content engine for deep audience insights
description: Overall its powerful, persona driven content creation and deep audience research USP is making it as a ideal tool in the content creation ecosystem
author: Nishant T.
pros: - AI powered tool supercharges content creation with deep market insight and persona driven automation - Wider umbrella of services such as blog optimisation, content gap analysis, semantic topic clustering and competitors insights - Delivers high quality structured content output - Helpful customer service support
cons: - Slight complex platform which needs steep learning curve - UI seems cultured with various input fields, questions and configurations - Worth for those who are will to invest in planning and research
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Overly complex writing software
description: Not super great of an experience. Needs more training materials with a walkthrough on how to use the product.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that this software is designed to help you write for specific audiences on specific topics. In fact, it asks you all of these questions as you start setting up the project you're working on.
cons: The actual process of setting up a project. As someone that's never used AI writing software before, there wasn't much (if anything) to educate me on how to use the product. I've since started using other products like WordHero and Jarvis. Jarvis has a wonderful training bootcamp that helped me feel incredibly confident to where I'm able to use the app with great success. CrawlQ is still just a great big mystery on how to use it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An Excellent Research Tool For Copywriters, Marketers, and Analyst
description: My overall experience has been great! There are some people who are dissatisfied at the direction that Crawlq has gone. I am not. Crawlq started as seo tool. It has now developed into a full fledged market research tool, which is far more valuable and now offers SEO, Copywriting, Social Media, Psychology, and deep market research benefits. They have also tapped into GPT-3 which is technology that is not free. The product is now a superior product in every way and those who complain at a small change of terms had been offered a full refund. What more can you ask of a company? I am very happy with CrawlQ and look forward to what the future holds.
author: Chris S.
pros: True marketing should be based off of a deep understanding of the markets psychology. What they want, need, dream of, the language they speak and how they speak it, their fears, and the motivations. Most of the time marketers, copywriters, business owners etc. just throw a bunch of guesses out into the marketplace and hope that something sticks. Doing it like this is expensive, disrespectful to the market, and ineffective. CrawlQ helps to delve into the markets psyche to develop and understand what the market is looking for. A very unique product that has a great future.
cons: What I like the least is actually what makes the software so effective. It's the actual time it takes to uncover the stones of the market's motivations. This process is time consuming and a pain, but once you do it... you'll have valuable resource at your disposal. A blueprint into how to sell to your market.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Its market research is even more in depth than a professional market research audit
description: I have a love and hate relationship with CrawlQ. I love it does deeper market research and discovery than I do professionally for my clients, I hate it because of the same reason because it is a ton of work. The founder and team really love the product and is passionate on sharing the results of their latest development and actual use case. Get it while it is one-time fee and before it goes enterprise and start costing a mortgage payment a month!
author: Valor L.
pros: You can write generic copy and get generic results. Or you can write killer copy and get sales and conversions. Most ai-writer is hit and miss and requires lots of editing and tinkering. With CrawlQ you do all the hard work upfront on market research such as discovery of pain points and your prospect's use of language. It really takes you in the shoes of a professional copywriter, except it is ai, and once you train it, you get a professional ai copywriter who dishes out killer copy for you - hands free.
cons: Every new business/niche, it is a pain to fill out hundreds of market research questions, but it has to be done for the business to be validated and successful. CrawlQ is not some get-rich-quick or magical pill to solve your problem overnight. However it is your best copywriter who will never leave you and is of one time fee only once you train it up.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: CrawlQ AI is your content J.A.R.V.I.S.
description: CrawlQ is an AI-powered online content creation platform that automatically creates content that helps you rank your site and grow your audience. You can also use it as a powerful marketing tool to reach out to your visitors and convert them into leads. It not only improves your relationship with your customers, but also boosts your traffic and sales.
author: Alexis L.
pros: Creates exclusive professional-level content (just like a copywriter) Has a well-designed workflow for best results Variety of features, from SEO to sales Improved audience filtering Artificial intelligence improved over time (updates have been productive)
cons: Not available in other languages. Workflow may take longer if you do not have technical knowledge.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Incredibly powerful AI tool, can change the writing industry.
description: I mainly use CrawlQ for creating engaging marketing articles. Among all the tools, the Market Research option is very well oriented, I can easily get different outputs based on my input. content automation sections provide awesome title suggestions and keyword targeting buyers' persona. it also includes grammar and spelling correction, which was very effective. Through I need to take much training, as the trial and error method to produce the best output from input data. It takes me around one month to master it.
author: Khan Md Mohaiuminul Islam S.
pros: Includes many features, but I like most Market research tool, I can generate an in-depth buyer persona with tons of input. CrawlQ prepares the awesome buyer persona based on questions, in fact, I can get entirely different buyer persona output by doing target audience keywords background research. AI content writer option helped me to write long-form of articles. By text summarize option I can easily make a summary from the existing paragraph. i must say it have very promising future, by using these tools i am able to develop engaging articles.
cons: In general point of view, I did not have any major problem with CrawlQ. Not for a newbie, need to take training to master. For me, it takes around one month to get the expected result. getting the best output needs many practices.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: If you want to know the deepest desires of your target audience, you must have CrawlQ!
description: Constant updates. And it's the most innovative use of AI that I'lve seen.
author: Elma P.
pros: CrawlQ is the only app that I know that helps me do market research. It's like crawling in the brains of my target audience, find their pains, desires, what is their typical day like, etc. Knowing these info (and most of the time, the audience don't even know their desires), and what I call the golden nuggets, I can "create a need" for my products. Now, that's powerful.Now it has GPT-4 and it also writes really well.Depending on how creative you are, this app can write anything that will use the same language as your audience. In writing, semantics is really important. Makes on relatable.
cons: This is not for bulk generation of content. And in my opinion, it is actually it's strength. CrawlQ is for targeted content creation. I don't see anything not to like about CrawlQ. For someone like me who used to spend $$$$$ on market research, this is the best that can replace that + the amount of time spent on researching is drastically reduced.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Best AI tool for Personas insight
description: It is now a stable component of my workflow
author: Luca M.
pros: Craiwq shines as an unique software that allow you to craft a high compelling message for an audience in every market sector. Does this with an amazing copy generator that help you understand Persona fears, desires, objections and angles. You start with a rough idea and after a few iterations you get mazing copy 100% AI written
cons: There's a step learning curve. It's not an easy gor all tool. You must study how to use it and how to get vest results. But when you do, results are stunning.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Find the public you need
author: Leonardo W.
pros: Have you tried to find your luggage on a huge airport without guidance? It's an horror story, now, scale that to the world. Same feeling when trying to find the correct public to spread the word about your product or service. CrawIQ help us to do just that. Find the correct public, and send the correct message. Really useful tool, with a fair price. It will help you to improve your workflow and increase conversion.
cons: They could improve the UX, but I think they are working on that.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Research and personalized content done right
description: Love the tool. It really helps me speak to my ideal client. It's not for those who just want the tool to do all the work. You have to provide thoughtful input.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: CrawlQ helps you research and target your ideal audience with the right content. Unlike other tools, I really had to provide thoughtful answers to get the perfect answers but you'll definitely get great, personalized results if you take the time to provide the answers. It's challenging but worth it.
cons: There is a learning curve and you have to understand your product or service in order to get useful info from the tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: All in one tool for content creation
description: I love how I can use this product to create my content and market research. I love how it is able to integrate with Facebook and other platforms to help me with my research. I love how I can create my buyer persona and use that as a guide to creating my content. I love the ability to create a large amount of content in a short amount of time. It helps me a lot with my business.
author: Kishore Reddy A.
pros: Crawlq.ai is an AI-based content generation tool that helps you create content that connects with your target audience. I like that it offers various tools like research, content creation, and keyword optimization that will give your marketing campaign a boost.
cons: Initially very hard to use. But later I am using comfortble. Only 10000 credits per month only. It was one of the draws back.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: High Quality Content AI Writer but..
description: If you looking for a high-quality Ai writer CrawlQ is a very good choice. But if you need something plug and go, CrawlQ might not the best option for you.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the output quality of CrawlQ that beats 80% of other Ai tools which I have been tried in the past.
cons: The learning curve is the biggest challenge for me at the start.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Cut Your Copywriting Time
author: Vince V.
pros: Flexible use cases. Quality AI copy provides a jumping off point when creating emails and other marketing copy.
cons: Long set up time, but it's absolutely worth it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great concept but needs lots of work
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Out of all its features, the Insight feature from CrawIQ is the most impressive. it’s grouped by the questions people ask around that topic, along with the answers. It is therefore a bit more natural when you process the information. For context: In the People also ask section on Google, you only get 4 questions. To collect more information, you need to search for a different keyword every time.
cons: The initial list of questions were way too long. I understand that i could just fill out parts of it and add a little more everyday, but the questions were largely poorly constructed and a lot of them were very similar
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Interesting product
author: Michael T.
pros: It seemed promising that one can train the AI to produce better, high-quality output. Unfortunately, it didn't work that well for my use case.
cons: One has to fill out a lot of information until good output can be created. It is quite time-consuming to do so. For my use case, the output was still not great after training the AI. Maybe I didn't enter enough information.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Tool for Content creation like no other (I know it's over words, but they live up to it)
description: We write a lot of blogs for our clients. The challenge was time research time, writing the content and rewriting it based on feedback. Now, my writers use CrawlQ for research and get the basic blog written for inspiration. It is saving a lot of time and the quality of output has increased drastically.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: There are tons of AI Writing tools out there. Most of them write content based on billions of generic scrolling. Once you create the persona, you get exclusive content as if it was written by a human. Content is well researched, niche-specific, clean, and meaningful. This is what makes CrawlQ different from others.
cons: The initial setup is a little time consuming and boring. But that's the reality, it has to be done even for human writing...
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Amazing content writing tool. One of a kind, puts all the others to shame.
description: Phenomenal. This is s as very powerful tool and is the most valuable marketing tool in my tech stack.
author: Prue M.
pros: This tool is amazing. It helps you create highly targeted content that speaks directly to your target market. While other content writing tools churn out a lot of poor quality writing, much of it plagiarised. CrawlQ content is 100% unique and focussed around your target customer. This is the tool that I had dream of but thought I would never find. It has been built using copywriting frameworks from the best copywriters including [SENSITIVE CONTENT] and more. It can produce blog posts, video sales letters, sales pages, emails, social media posts, and all use your customer research as a filter so they are highly targeted. Simply fantastic.
cons: The main problem people seem to have is they feel overwhelmed and confused when inputting the target customer research. That's really not a problem though because there is a course on sellonautopilot.com that makes the setup really simple and easy to understand.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very interesting concept and product, but takes a lot of time
description: I do find the idea of this tool very interesting, but the implementation of it is just too cumbersome for me because it takes a lot of initial time investment to get the best results out of it. I think of AI tools as something that should be fast and time saving. Nothing very quick about this tool since it requires that initial time investment to get your tailored output from the AI. Especially as someone who has already done the market research and developed my audience Persona, it feels too redundant for me to have to fill out these questions again. If you’re someone who is still in the process of establishing your niche and audience, then this might be a great tool to go through that process with. But if you’re expecting a tool where you can just fire it up and get some quick results to use incorporate into your content writing or marketing copy, this isn’t the tool for you.
author: Carol C.
pros: CrawlQ has taken an interesting approach to AI writing. Rather than focusing on just generating output from a given input like most other AI tools, its main purpose is to help you write for your audience by developing your target audience persona and niche. So if you have not yet done this step for your business, this tool may be a good one to take you through the process of getting one down and then helping you write target copy with the generated output from the AI.
cons: Unfortunately to get the best results out of this tool, you have to spend a LOT of time answering questions. Some of the documents require even more questions to be answered, and I’m not talking about 5 to 10 questions.. there are 150 questions on some of them. You CAN use the AI to help you fill in the answers to these questions but it is very time consuming still, so it’s definitely NOT for someone who wants quick AI written outputs fast.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Genius AI Content Writer
description: I have found CrawlQ to be extremely useful for my site. It helps me to get more traffic because of the high quality content it creates. I absolutely love it!
author: Abhinash J.
pros: I was looking for a way to create quality content for my website and social media accounts without having to spend the time and effort it takes to create unique content for each post. I came across CrawlQ and was intrigued because I knew this was something that could really help me scale up my content marketing efforts in a matter of minutes. They have a fast, easy to use tool that will create fresh, engaging content in a matter of seconds. The original, personalized content they wrote for my business has skyrocketed my website traffic.
cons: not much , overall I didn't find any cons
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ease of Use
description: As an everyday casual user, I have nothing but kudos for the CrawlIQ, and I look forward to any and all added features that'll be forthcomin
author: Sean B.
pros: The ease of use to implement such software/app that makes the everyday/weekly/monthly user so much happier knowing that it is not something that'll suck his productivity
cons: No cons; but looking forward to how added features will impact and become useful to the process, rather than just fluff
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Helps sales people by creating custom content for individual customers
author: Eric B.
pros: I was on the hunt for a tool that would help me generate content on a consistent basis. I knew that I needed something that could help me create content for my blog on a professional level. I found CrawlQ and decided to give it a try. I was blown away by the variety of content that CrawlQ could create for me. I was able to personalize all of my content to my target audience. I plan on continuing to use CrawlQ on a regular basis, because it is an affordable and easy-to-use tool that helps me stay focused on my writing.
cons: It can be difficult to customize marketing materials to your prospects based on your niche.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Rising AI-driven industry research and content writing tool
description: CrawlQ is a software that aims to help you understand what your customers want and need. It can be a bit difficult to get started, especially if you are not familiar with the types of features it offers. However, once you have successfully used CrawlQ for a while, it will prove itself worth the effort in the end. It has many features, but the market research capabilities are what make it stand out from other scheduling apps on the market. It helps brand managers strategize their content strategy with ease by providing insight on how to best structure a meeting, which can be helpful in creating effective marketing strategies for companies looking to grow their brand. Still learning the software to get the best possible result.
author: Alston A.
pros: -The depth of the market research capabilities - Number of mini-tools available within the platform - Their AI content writer "Athena" feature to write content based on our market research
cons: -Bit complex for beginners to start using it immediately where it has learning curve -Not suited for everyone
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Once you get CrawlQ configured, it's the best AI writing assistant on the market!
author: Stephen H.
pros: Once it's set up correctly, it produces excellent results consistently!
cons: The set up process is extensive and can be fairly challenging for the uninitiated
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Impressive Advancements for AI Content Creation
description: Unlike other AI content creation software that pull information from a headline or sentence, CrawlQ is one of those that actually takes all of that + considers all the factors from your buyer persona when created during the market research phase, which makes the content highly targeted. It's been very impressive so far, but I hope the steps involved and training becomes more user friendly in the future.
author: Steve B.
pros: Allowing to input your buyer persona via market research into it allows for highly targeted content when created.
cons: It can be overwhelming at the begining with a lot of features. You'll need to watch a lot of user case examples to get a better understanding of the workflow.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
